card.name: BC01 Brown Squirrel
card.text: Elsewhere 1 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) This creature's mana cost is {1} as it is sacrificed for apex costs. (As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. Reduce this spell's mana cost by the mana costs of the creatures sacrificed.) A deck may contain any number of cards named Brown Squirrel.

card.name: CC01 Butterfly Caterpillar
card.text: Fledgling 2 — Butterfly Cocoon (Put at time counter on this at your end step. Then if there's 2 or more time counters, you may sacrifice this to put Butterfly Cocoon from your elsewhere onto the battlefield.)

card.name: CC02 Butterfly Cocoon
card.text: Elsewhere 1 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) Fledgling 1 — Mature Butterfly (Put at time counter on this at your end step. Then if there's 1 or more time counters, you may sacrifice this to put Mature Butterfly from your elsewhere onto the battlefield.)

card.name: CC03 Mature Butterfly
card.text: Elsewhere 1 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) Flying

card.name: CC04 Primordial Ruin
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. If three or more colors of mana were spent to cast this spell, you gain 3 life.

card.name: MC01 The Great Ur-Population
card.text: Elsewhere 10 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) Apex (As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. Reduce this spell's mana cost by the mana costs of the creatures sacrificed.) You may only cast this from your Elsewhere and can't spend mana to cast it. When you cast this spell, put an indestructible counter on each creature you control.

card.name: MC02 Nameful, the First Child
card.text: Fledgling 7 — Nameful Guardian of Populations (Put at time counter on this at your end step. Then if there's 7 or more time counters, you may sacrifice this to put Nameful Guardian of Populations from your elsewhere onto the battlefield.) Whenever another Human, Avala, Merfolk, Agona, Goblin, Elf, or Zagdar you control enters, put a time counter on this creature.

card.name: MC03 Nameful Guardian of Populations
card.text: Elsewhere 5 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) [-1]: Exile up to one target permanent. If it's a — • Creature, sacrifice a permanent. • Artifact or enchantment, discard a card. • Planeswalker or battle, you lose 3 life. • Land, you lose 3 life, sacrifice a permanent, and discard a card.

card.name: CW01 Illulbian Fodder-Raider
card.text: Raid — When this creature dies, if you attacked this turn, put a counter of a kind that was on this creature or that's already there on target creature.

card.name: CW02 Mouse Pup
card.text: Fledgling 3 — Mature Mouse (Put at time counter on this at your end step. Then if there's 3 or more time counters, you may sacrifice this to put Mature Mouse from your elsewhere onto the battlefield.) When this creature dies, you gain 2 life.

card.name: CW03 Mature Mouse
card.text: Elsewhere 1 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) Lifelink

card.name: CW04 Lesser Angel Egg
card.text: Fledgling 4 — Mature Lesser Angel (Put at time counter on this at your end step. Then if there's 4 or more time counters, you may sacrifice this to put Mature Lesser Angel from your elsewhere onto the battlefield.) {W}, Sacrifice a creature: Put a time counter on this creature. When this creature dies, each player draws two cards.

card.name: CW05 Mature Lesser Angel
card.text: Elsewhere 1 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) Apex (As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. Reduce this spell's mana cost by the mana costs of the creatures sacrificed.) Flying

card.name: CW06 Illulbian Figurehead
card.text: Evoke {1}{W} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.) When this creature enters, destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: CW07 Seer-Eye Feline
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: CW08 Pervasive Hope
card.text: When this creature enters, put a Glimmer infestation counter on target creature. (When it dies, create an X/X colorless creature token with mana cost {X} and all types it was infested by, where X is the number of infestation counters it had.) Evoke {W} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: CW09 Restorative Rampager
card.text: Raid — When this creature enters, if you attacked this turn, return target permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CW10 Angelic Recovery
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you control an Angel, it also gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: CW11 Leeching Smite
card.text: This spell deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. You gain life equal to its toughness.

card.name: CW12 Banishing Fire
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target creature and up to one target token until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: CW13 Hive of Insight
card.text: When this artifact enters, draw a card. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put two Insect infestation counters on target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery. (When it dies, create an X/X colorless creature token with mana cost {X} and all types it was infested by, where X is the number of infestation counters it had.)

card.name: MW01 The Great Ur-Angel
card.text: Elsewhere 10 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) Apex (As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. Reduce this spell's mana cost by the mana costs of the creatures sacrificed.) You may only cast this from your Elsewhere and can't spend mana to cast it. When you cast this spell, creatures you control gain flying, lifelink, and vigilance until end of turn. Flying

card.name: UW14 Seek Purity
card.text: Destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.text: Raid — When this creature dies, if you attacked this turn, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.text: Evoke {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.) When this creature enters, return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: CU08 Illusory Increment
card.text: When this creature enters, put a counter of a kind that's on this creature or that's already there on target creature. Evoke {U} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: CU09 Wildlife Insight
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, draw a card. Enchanted creature's mana cost is increased by {1}. Enchanted creature has "{T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells."

card.name: CU10 Sphinxian Riddling
card.text: If you control a Sphinx, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Draw two cards.

card.name: CU11 Essence Pierce
card.text: Counter target creature spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: CU12 Guised Prevention
card.text: Counter target spell. Put an Illusion infestation counter on target creature. (When it dies, create an X/X colorless creature token with mana cost {X} and all types it was infested by, where X is the number of infestation counters it had.)

card.name: CU13 Nullification
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and has base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: MU01 The Great Ur-Sphinx
card.text: Elsewhere 10 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) Apex (As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. Reduce this spell's mana cost by the mana costs of the creatures sacrificed.) You may only cast this from your Elsewhere and can't spend mana to cast it. When you cast this spell, until end of turn, you may cast spells without paying their mana costs. Flying

card.text: Apex (As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. Reduce this spell's mana cost by the mana costs of the creatures sacrificed.) Draw three cards.

card.name: CB08 Infested Terror
card.text: This creature enters with two Nightmare infestation counters. (When it dies, create an X/X colorless creature token with mana cost {X} and all types it was infested by, where X is the number of infestation counters it had.)

card.name: CB09 Blood Reaping
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature with mana value X. Surveil X, then draw two cards. (To surveil X, look at the top X cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: CB10 Demonic Torture
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a creature card from it. They discard that card. You lose 2 life. If you control a Demon, instead you gain 2 life and each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: CB11 Wartime Tactics
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets -2/-1 until end of turn. • Target creature gets +2/+1 until end of turn. • Put a card named Brown Squirrel from your elsewhere into your hand.

card.name: CB12 Souldrain
card.text: Destroy target creature. You gain life equal to its mana value.

card.name: CB13 Nightmare Tremors

card.name: CR09 Strategic Inspiration
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Target player draws two cards. Up to one target creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is twice its mana value.

card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If you control a Dragon, draw a card.

card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Put an Insect infestation counter a creature you control. card.text: This spell deals 1 damage to target creature. {1}{I}, Discard this card: Destroy target enchantment. {1}{I}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Scry 2.

card.name: MI01 The Great Ur-Chimera
card.text: Elsewhere 10 (This card can start in your elsewhere. An elsewhere's starting value can't exceed 10.) Apex (As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. card.name: CZ01 Peacemakers of Frost
card.text: Flash Primordial — When this creature enters, put half X, rounded down, shield counters on target permanent, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard. (If a permanent with a shield counter on it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: CZ02 Peacemakers of Darkness
card.text: Flying Primordial — When this creature enters, surveil X, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ03 Peacemakers of Blood
card.text: Menace Primordial — When this creature enters, it deals X damage to each opponent, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ04 Peacemakers of Fire
card.text: Trample Primordial — When this creature enters, create half X, rounded down, tapped Treasure tokens, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ05 Peacemakers of Life
card.text: Vigilance Primordial — When this creature enters, put half X, rounded down, cards named Brown Squirrel from your elsewhere into your hand, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ06 Peacemakers of Bone
card.text: Lifelink Primordial — When this creature enters, you gain X life, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ07 Peacemakers of Thunder
card.text: Reach Primordial — When this creature enters, discard half X cards, then draw half X cards, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard. Round down each card.

card.name: CZ08 Peacemakers of Death
card.text: Deathtouch Primordial — When this creature enters, mill X cards, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ09 Peacemakers of Light
card.text: First strike Primordial — When this creature enters, this creature deals X damage to target tapped creature, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ10 Peacemakers of Water
card.text: Ward {1} Primordial — When this creature enters, put half X, rounded down, +1/+1 counters on target creature, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ11 Renegades of Loyalty
card.text: Flying Primordial — When this creature enters, create half X, rounded down, 1/1 silver Fractal tokens, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ12 Renegades of Knowledge
card.text: Vigilance Primordial — When this creature enters, scry X, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: CZ13 Renegades of Persistence
card.text: Primordial — When this creature enters, you gain half X life and each opponent loses half X life, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard. Round down each time.

card.name: CZ14 Renegades of Courage
card.text: Haste Primordial — When this creature enters, exile the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard. You may play one of them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: CZ15 Renegades of Strength
card.text: Primordial — When this creature enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of colors among cards in your graveyard. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: CA01 Primordial Leylith
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: CA02 Condensed Terrain
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it on top of your library, then shuffle. {T}: Surveil 1. {1}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: RA01 Figurehead Aether-Corpse
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is the number of aether counters on this artifact. Whenever you cast a spell with evoke for its evoke cost, put an aether counter on this artifact. Whenever you cast a spell with evoke for its normal cost, untap this artifact.

card.name: Clue [Token] TOW
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Treasure [Token] TOW
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: UL01 Manapool of Frost
card.text: This land enters tapped. When it does, untap it at the beginning of the next end step. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.
